slots.title: QoderWork 2025
slots.subtitle: Redefining Intelligent Development
slots.description: An AI-native platform that transforms how teams build, test, and deploy software — from idea to production in minutes.

slots.title:
Product Overview
What Makes Us Different
slots.subtitle: A new paradigm for software development
slots.statement: We believe the best code is the code you never have to write

slots.title: From Idea to Deployment
slots.subtitle: The QoderWork Pipeline
slots.block1Copy: Understands your intent through natural language and converts it into structured development tasks automatically.
slots.block2Copy: Generates production-ready code that follows your team's conventions, patterns, and best practices.
slots.block3Copy: Runs tests, linting, and type checks in real time — catching issues before they reach production.

slots.title: Why QoderWork
slots.subtitle: Two pillars that set us apart
slots.block1Copy: Unlike generic AI tools, QoderWork deeply understands your codebase structure, dependency graph, and team conventions. Every suggestion is grounded in your project's reality, not generic patterns.
slots.block2Copy: We don't replace developers — we amplify them. Every generated artifact is reviewable, editable, and traceable. Full transparency into what was changed and why, giving your team complete control.

slots.title: Core Capabilities
slots.subtitle: Built for real-world engineering teams
slots.block1Copy: Detects code smells and suggests safe, incremental refactors with full test coverage preserved.
slots.block2Copy: Auto-generates PR descriptions, reviews changes, and flags potential regressions before merge.

slots.title: Enterprise-Ready Architecture
slots.subtitle: Security, scale, and compliance built in
slots.block1Copy: End-to-end encryption, audit logs, and role-based access control. Your code never leaves your infrastructure.
slots.block2Copy: Deploy on your own cloud or on-premise. Full air-gap support for regulated industries.
slots.block3Copy: Handles repositories with 10M+ lines of code. Horizontal scaling with zero-downtime deployments.

slots.title: Integrations
slots.subtitle: Works where your team works
slots.block1Copy: Native integration with Actions, PRs, and code review workflows.
slots.block2Copy: Auto-links tasks to code changes for full traceability.
slots.block3Copy: Real-time notifications and conversational code queries.
slots.block4Copy: Plugs into Jenkins, CircleCI, and GitHub Actions seamlessly.

slots.title: Impact at Scale
slots.subtitle: Measured across 200+ enterprise teams
slots.data1Desc: Reduction in time-to-merge for pull requests
slots.data2Desc: Faster onboarding for new team members
slots.data3Desc: Test pass rate on AI-generated code

slots.quote:
"QoderWork didn't just speed up
our development — it fundamentally
changed how we think about
building software."
slots.subtitle: — VP of Engineering, Fortune 500 Tech Company

slots.title: Getting Started
slots.subtitle: Three steps to transform your workflow
slots.step1Copy: Link your GitHub or GitLab repository. QoderWork indexes your codebase and learns your team's patterns within minutes.
slots.step2Copy: Set coding standards, review policies, and team preferences. The AI adapts to your conventions, not the other way around.
slots.step3Copy: Start building. Every PR gets intelligent review, every refactor is validated, and every deployment is safer than before.

slots.statement: The future of software development is collaborative, intelligent, and human-centered
slots.subtitle: Our mission is to make every developer 10x more productive while maintaining the craft they love

slots.title: Before & After QoderWork
slots.subtitle: How teams transform their development workflow
